title: crotalaria linifolia
intro: Crotalaria linifolia, also known as needle bush or needle-leaf crotalaria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, thanks to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Crotalaria linifolia are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
